testcase.name: Login with valid credentials #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resource/features/Login.feature:13 Given User navigates to login page # stepdefinitions.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enters valid email address "utkarsh1783197765848@gmail.com" into the email field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_enters_valid_email_address_into_the_email_field(java.lang.String) And User has entered valid password "12345" into password field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_password_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Login button # stepdefinitions.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get successfully logged in # stepdefinitions.Login.user_should_get_successfully_logged_in()
testcase.system-err: Jul 05, 2026 1:15:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 05, 2026 1:15:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.201. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.30.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Login with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/resource/features/Login.feature:18 Given User navigates to login page # stepdefinitions.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enters invalid email address into email field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_enters_invalid_email_address_into_email_field() And User enters invalid password "1234567654" into password field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_enters_invalid_password_into_password_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Login button # stepdefinitions.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get a proper warning message about credentials mismatch # stepdefinitions.Login.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_message_about_credentials_mismatch()

testcase.name: Login with invalid email and valid password
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid email and valid password # src/test/resource/features/Login.feature:32 Given User navigates to login page # stepdefinitions.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enters invalid email address into email field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_enters_invalid_email_address_into_email_field() And User has entered valid password "12345" into password field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_password_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Login button # stepdefinitions.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get a proper warning message about credentials mismatch # stepdefinitions.Login.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_message_about_credentials_mismatch()

testcase.name: Login without providing any credentials
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login without providing any credentials # src/test/resource/features/Login.feature:39 Given User navigates to login page # stepdefinitions.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User dont enter email address into email field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_dont_enter_email_address_into_email_field() And User dont enter password into password field # stepdefinitions.Login.user_dont_enter_password_into_password_field() And User clicks on Login button # stepdefinitions.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get a proper warning message about credentials mismatch # stepdefinitions.Login.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_message_about_credentials_mismatch()

testcase.name: User creates an account only with mandatory fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account only with mandatory fields # src/test/resource/features/Register.feature:3 Given User navigates to Register Account Page # stepdefinitions.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() utkarsh1783237546501@gmail.com When User enters the details into below fields # stepdefinitions.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_below_fields(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Utkarsh | | lastName | Patil | | telephone | 123456565 | | password | 12345 | And User selects Privacy Policy # stepdefinitions.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on Continue button # stepdefinitions.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User account should get created successfully # stepdefinitions.Register.user_account_should_get_created_successfully()

testcase.name: User creates an account with all fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account with all fields # src/test/resource/features/Register.feature:14 Given User navigates to Register Account Page # stepdefinitions.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() utkarsh1783237550665@gmail.com When User enters the details into below fields # stepdefinitions.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_below_fields(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Utkarsh | | lastName | Patil | | telephone | 123456565 | | password | 12345 | And User selects Yes for Newsletter # stepdefinitions.Register.user_selects_yes_for_newsletter() And User selects Privacy Policy # stepdefinitions.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on Continue button # stepdefinitions.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User account should get created successfully # stepdefinitions.Register.user_account_should_get_created_successfully()

testcase.name: User creates a duplicate account
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates a duplicate account # src/test/resource/features/Register.feature:26 Given User navigates to Register Account Page # stepdefinitions.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User enters the details into below fields with duplicate email # stepdefinitions.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_below_fields_with_duplicate_email(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Utkarsh | | lastName | Patil | | email | amortori785@gmail.com | | telephone | 123456565 | | password | 12345 | And User selects Yes for Newsletter # stepdefinitions.Register.user_selects_yes_for_newsletter() And User selects Privacy Policy # stepdefinitions.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on Continue button # stepdefinitions.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User should get a proper warning about duplicate email # stepdefinitions.Register.user_should_get_a_proper_warning_about_duplicate_email()

testcase.name: User creates an account without filling any details
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account without filling any details # src/test/resource/features/Register.feature:39 Given User navigates to Register Account Page # stepdefinitions.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User dont enter any details into fields # stepdefinitions.Register.user_dont_enter_any_details_into_fields() And User clicks on Continue button # stepdefinitions.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User should get proper warning messages for every mandatory field # stepdefinitions.Register.user_should_get_proper_warning_messages_for_every_mandatory_field(java.util.List<java.lang.String>) | First Name must be between 1 and 32 characters! | | Last Name must be between 1 and 32 characters! | | E-Mail Address does not appear to be valid! | | Telephone must be between 3 and 32 characters! | | Password must be between 4 and 20 characters! |

testcase.name: User searches for a valid product
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:87) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:75) at stepdefinitions.Search.user_should_get_valid_product_displayed_in_search_results(Search.java:47) at ✽.User should get valid product displayed in search results(file:///C:/Users/utkar/OneDrive/Desktop/Resources/Workspace/CucumberHybridFramework/TutorialsNinjaProject/src/test/resource/features/Search.feature:7)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: User searches for a valid product # src/test/resource/features/Search.feature:3 Given User opens the Application # stepdefinitions.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User enters valid product "HP" into Search box field # stepdefinitions.Search.user_enters_valid_product_into_search_box_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Search button # stepdefinitions.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get valid product displayed in search results # stepdefinitions.Search.user_should_get_valid_product_displayed_in_search_results() java.lang.AssertionError at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:87) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:75) at stepdefinitions.Search.user_should_get_valid_product_displayed_in_search_results(Search.java:47) at ✽.User should get valid product displayed in search results(file:///C:/Users/utkar/OneDrive/Desktop/Resources/Workspace/CucumberHybridFramework/TutorialsNinjaProject/src/test/resource/features/Search.feature:7)
Embedding User_searches_for_a_valid_product [image/png 99689 bytes]

testcase.name: User searches for an invalid product
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User searches for an invalid product # src/test/resource/features/Search.feature:9 Given User opens the Application # stepdefinitions.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User enters invalid product "Honda" into Search box field # stepdefinitions.Search.user_enters_invalid_product_into_search_box_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Search button # stepdefinitions.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get a message about no product matching # stepdefinitions.Search.user_should_get_a_message_about_no_product_matching()

testcase.name: User searches without any product
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User searches without any product # src/test/resource/features/Search.feature:15 Given User opens the Application # stepdefinitions.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User dont enter any product name into Search box field # stepdefinitions.Search.user_dont_enter_any_product_name_into_search_box_field() And User clicks on Search button # stepdefinitions.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get a message about no product matching # stepdefinitions.Search.user_should_get_a_message_about_no_product_matching()
